{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Pride's madra
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Pride]] uses black and gray [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c13">''Uncrowned'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
